response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack and polyglot engineer with breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the role requires deep C++ specialization and large-scale cloud compute platform leadership. Resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015), falling far short of the 8 years of C++ required. There is no demonstrated experience building large-scale distributed infrastructure, cloud compute platforms, or formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and AI tooling
Strong testing/TDD discipline and history of mentoring through workshops and courses
Founder-level ownership demonstrated via GISCollective and multiple open-source libraries
concerns: Only ~6 months of C/C++ experience vs. 8-year minimum requirement
No evidence of large-scale distributed systems or cloud compute platform engineering
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of large-scale distributed infrastructure experience
